question.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.

variants.text: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.

hints.hint:
After negative/restrictive adverbials (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom, Only then…), **subject-auxiliary inversion** is required.
The inverted auxiliary must match the tense of the original clause. Only the auxiliary comes before the subject.

Po przysłówkach o znaczeniu ograniczającym (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom…) wymagana jest inwersja podmiotu i operatora.
Inwertowany operator musi odpowiadać czasowi zdania. Tylko operator przechodzi przed podmiot.

«Only after + підрядне» на початку речення викликає інверсію Past Simple: «Only after... did + підмет + базова форма».
«Allow» — базова форма після «did»; обидва часи Past Simple.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Correct. «did» is the right form here based on the grammar rule for this sentence type.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Poprawnie. «did» jest właściwą formą zgodnie z regułą gramatyczną tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Did» — правильна інверсія Past Simple після «Only after»; «Only after the meeting ended did she allow».

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Did» — правильна інверсія Past Simple після «Only after»; «Only after the meeting ended did she allow».

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «had» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «had» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» утворило б Past Perfect; «allow» у базовій формі вказує на Past Simple.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» утворило б Past Perfect; «allow» у базовій формі вказує на Past Simple.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «would» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «would» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Would she allow» — умовна форма; «Only after» тут описує конкретний минулий момент.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Only after the meeting ended {a1} she allow herself to relax.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Would she allow» — умовна форма; «Only after» тут описує конкретний минулий момент.
